run_summary: One UNDERDONE flag (GTLB) presented; earnings print has already passed (2026-06-02 is 7 days in the past as of 2026-06-09). Flag is stale and ineligible. No open positions to manage.

entries.name: GitLab
entries.thesis: The May 11 pre-announcement is a deliberate de-risking move by management — they would not have reaffirmed guidance and announced a RIF (typically a negative-perception event) 3 weeks before print unless Q1 was tracking at or above plan. Combined with the buyback authorization and the FY26 cash flow inflection (-8% to +24% OCF margin) plus 26% growth in $1M+ ARR cohort, the filings posture is meaningfully more constructive than a stock that has had multiple CFO transitions (Robins out Sept 2025, Shen interim, Ross arriving Jan 2026) and a securities class action overhang would typically suggest.
entries.what_kills: NDR drops further below 118% reported in FY26 (already down from 123% prior year); large enterprise deals slip; Duo Agent Platform (GA Jan 2026) shows weak early monetization data; RIF framed defensively rather than reinvestment-driven on the call.
entries.reasoning: Earnings print already passed — flag is stale. The earnings_date 2026-06-02 is 7 calendar days in the past relative to run timestamp 2026-06-09. Screen 2's edge is pre-print reading quality; once the print has occurred, the flag's thesis window is closed and the signal is no longer actionable. This UNDERDONE classification at confidence 3 would otherwise qualify (passes min_buy_confidence threshold and is not OVERDONE), but the earnings event the flag was timed to has already resolved.
